summary: Iteration 32 - Document Expiry Tracking Feature Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. Backend APIs for set-expiry, expiring/all, expiring/case, validity-presets, upload with expiry, and bulk-upload with expiry all working correctly. Client Dashboard shows Document Expiry Alerts card with color-coded urgency, Expiry column in My Documents table with badges and Set Expiry links, and Set Expiry modal with date input and notes. Case Manager Dashboard shows Expiry Alerts sidebar nav with badge count, summary cards (Expired, Critical, Warning, Attention), full expiring documents table with client/case info, and Edit Expiry modal.
critical_code_review_comments: Document expiry tracking feature is well-implemented with proper urgency level calculations
Auto-expiry for known document types (passport=10yr, medical=1yr, ielts=2yr, etc.) working correctly
Both Client and Case Manager can set/edit expiry dates as designed
Timezone-aware datetime handling implemented correctly for expiry calculations
seed_data_creation: Test documents created during backend tests with various expiry dates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested Document Expiry Tracking feature. ALL PASSED: (1) POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/set-expiry - Client and Manager can set expiry, (2) GET /api/documents/expiring/all - Returns all expiring docs with urgency levels, client names, case numbers (manager/admin only), (3) GET /api/documents/expiring/case/{case_id} - Returns docs for specific case with expiry info and auto-suggest, (4) GET /api/documents/validity-presets - Returns known doc types with validity periods, (5) POST /api/documents/upload - Accepts optional expiry_date and auto-sets for known types, (6) POST /api/documents/bulk-upload - Accepts optional expiry_dates JSON array, (7) Client Dashboard - Document Expiry Alerts card with color-coded urgency rows, Expiry column in My Documents table with badges and Set Expiry links, Set Expiry modal with date input and notes, (8) Case Manager Dashboard - Expiry Alerts sidebar nav with badge count, summary cards (Expired/Critical/Warning/Attention counts), full expiring documents table with Edit buttons, Edit Expiry modal. Urgency levels: expired (<0 days), critical (0-30), warning (30-60), attention (60-90), ok (>90), no_expiry (not set).

backend_apis.auth_login_all_roles: PASS - All 4 roles (admin, case_manager, partner, client) login correctly
backend_apis.validity_presets: PASS - Returns 11 known document types with validity periods
backend_apis.expiring_case: PASS - Returns docs for specific case with urgency and suggested_validity_days
backend_apis.expiring_all_manager: PASS - Manager gets all expiring docs with client/case info
backend_apis.expiring_all_admin: PASS - Admin gets all expiring docs
backend_apis.set_expiry_client: PASS - Client can set expiry on their documents
backend_apis.set_expiry_manager: PASS - Manager can set expiry on documents
backend_apis.upload_with_explicit_expiry: PASS - Upload with expiry_date sets the expiry
backend_apis.bulk_upload_with_expiry_dates: PASS - Bulk upload with expiry_dates array works
backend_apis.urgency_levels_calculation: PASS - Urgency levels correctly calculated based on days remaining

client_dashboard.document_expiry_alerts_card: PASS - Shows in Overview tab with color-coded urgency rows
client_dashboard.expiry_column_in_table: PASS - My Documents table has Expiry column
client_dashboard.expiry_badges: PASS - Documents with expiry show date badges
client_dashboard.set_expiry_links: PASS - Documents without expiry show 'Set Expiry' links
client_dashboard.set_expiry_modal: PASS - Modal opens with date input, notes textarea, Cancel/Save buttons

case_manager_dashboard.expiry_alerts_sidebar_nav: PASS - Sidebar has 'Expiry Alerts' nav item
case_manager_dashboard.expiry_alerts_badge_count: PASS - Badge shows count of urgent docs
case_manager_dashboard.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Expired, Critical, Warning, Attention counts
case_manager_dashboard.expiring_documents_table: PASS - Full table with Document, Client, Case, Expiry Date, Status, Action columns
case_manager_dashboard.edit_expiry_modal: PASS - Modal opens with pre-filled date, notes, Cancel/Save buttons

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - send_email logs to email_logs collection
